positive: A stylized, symmetrical composition featuring interconnected cosmic elements and mystical bioluminescent flora. Central focus is a detailed, crescent moon entangled with geometric constellations and large, stylized leaves (acanthus and fern forms). Use a clean, neo-art deco graphic style with strong, crisp silhouettes. The color palette should be limited to deep midnight blues, iridescent violets, electric teals, and glowing gold accents. The composition must be highly centralized and scalable for fabric printing, featuring clear vector lines and high contrast suitable for screen printing. Overhead, diffuse spotlighting emphasizing the glow of the cosmic elements. Aspect ratio 1:1.
negative: blur, text, watermark, logo, signature, low resolution, noise, artifacts, bad anatomy, deformed, extra limbs, grain, muddy colors, jpeg artifacts, gradient shading, photorealism
